summary: Iteration 130: Frontend testing of P0 dashboard widget collapse bug fix (DashboardPage.js). Tested owner/consolidated view and branch view. Owner dashboard works correctly with all widgets properly sized. Branch dashboard has a RESIDUAL BUG: 6 of 11 widgets collapse to 30x96px (1x1 grid unit) when switching from owner to branch view within the same session. Reset Layout button and page refresh both fix it.

ui_bugs.issue: 6 branch-specific widgets collapse to 30px height (1 row) × 96px width (1 col) when switching from owner/consolidated view to branch view within the same session. Affected: cash position, ar overview, credits today, ar payments, top products, recent sales.
ui_bugs.priority: CRITICAL - P0 bug still partially present

issues: Company admin login (jovelyneahig@gmail.com / Aa@050772) returns 401 - credentials may be invalid in this environment. Super admin login works.

branch_dashboard_on_switch.scenario: Switching from owner view to branch view without page refresh

branch_dashboard_after_page_refresh.scenario: After page refresh while in branch view

rca_of_the_issue.bug: layouts useState lazy initializer only runs once on component mount
rca_of_the_issue.explanation: The layouts state is initialized via: `const [layouts, setLayouts] = useState(() => { ... })`. This lazy initializer executes ONCE when DashboardPage mounts. When the user switches from owner view (isConsolidatedView=true) to branch view (isConsolidatedView=false), the `layoutKey` and `defaultLayout` variables change, but the `layouts` state still holds the old OWNER_DEFAULT_LAYOUT values. Branch-specific widgets (cash-position, ar-overview, credits-today, ar-payments, top-products, recent-sales) are NOT present in OWNER_DEFAULT_LAYOUT, so react-grid-layout places them at default w=1, h=1 positions (30px × 96px).
rca_of_the_issue.why_validateLayouts_didnt_help: validateLayouts() validates localStorage data on initialization, but the issue is with in-memory state that doesn't reset when the view switches.
rca_of_the_issue.workaround: User can click 'Reset Layout' button (calls setLayouts(defaultLayout)) or refresh the page
rca_of_the_issue.fix_required: Add a useEffect that updates layouts state when layoutKey changes: `useEffect(() => { const saved = localStorage.getItem(layoutKey); const loaded = saved ? validateLayouts(JSON.parse(saved), defaultLayout) : defaultLayout; setLayouts(loaded); }, [layoutKey]);`
reproduction_steps: 2. Dashboard loads in Owner/Consolidated view - all widgets correct
3. Click branch selector, select any specific branch (e.g., Branch 1)
4. Branch dashboard appears with 6 widgets collapsed to tiny 30px×96px boxes
5. Click Reset Layout → all widgets appear correctly

action_items: HIGH PRIORITY: Add useEffect in DashboardPage.js to reset layouts state when layoutKey changes. The layouts useState lazy initializer doesn't re-run when isConsolidatedView changes. Fix: add `useEffect(() => { try { const saved = localStorage.getItem(layoutKey); const loaded = saved ? validateLayouts(JSON.parse(saved), defaultLayout) : defaultLayout; setLayouts(loaded); } catch { setLayouts(defaultLayout); } }, [layoutKey]);` in DashboardPage.js
LOW: Company admin credentials (jovelyneahig@gmail.com / Aa@050772) return 401 - may need to verify/reset password
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardPage.js: The `layouts` useState lazy initializer (line 229-234) only runs once on mount. When `isConsolidatedView` switches, the `layoutKey` and `defaultLayout` change but `layouts` state doesn't update. This causes branch-specific widgets to collapse to w=1,h=1 on owner→branch view switch.

DashboardPage.js: The validateLayouts() function was correctly implemented to prevent stale localStorage from causing collapse, but it doesn't address the in-memory state reset needed when switching views.
DashboardPage.js: The fix (MIN_H_MAP, MIN_W_MAP, isResizable, h-full) addresses the localStorage persistence issue but NOT the view-switch issue. The P0 bug is partially fixed.

Chart warnings: 6x 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' warnings - these may be related to the recharts inside SalesTrendsWidget and BranchComparisonWidget not being properly sized during initial render (likely due to flex container sizing), not the grid collapse bug itself.

success_rate.frontend: 64% (7/11 features pass - Owner dashboard fully working, branch fresh load working, but branch switch from owner view triggers collapse)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 130 tested the P0 dashboard widget collapse fix. Owner view is fully working. Branch view has a residual bug: switching from owner to branch view within the same session collapses 6 widgets (cash-position, ar-overview, credits-today, ar-payments, top-products, recent-sales). Root cause: layouts useState doesn't reset when isConsolidatedView changes. Fix: add useEffect in DashboardPage.js to update layouts when layoutKey changes. All other features (drag handles, resize handles, Reset Layout button, data display) work correctly.
